query: UPDATE games SET gameDate = '2026-03-08', startTimeEst = '00:00' WHERE (awayTeam IN ('long_beach_state','hawaii') OR homeTeam IN ('long_beach_state','hawaii')) AND gameDate IN ('2026-03-07', '2026-03-06', '2026-03-05');
